data.title: How StellarAIO fires 70+ checkouts in parallel.
data.subtitle: The architecture that turns a $199 subscription into a parallel checkout machine.
data.author: StellarAIO

data.caption: retailer modules ship in one subscription. Walmart, Pokémon Center, Best Buy, Target, AMD, SNKRS, Foot Locker, and 60+ more.
data.footnote: Source: StellarAIO live Whop product page, 2026

data.title: Five things happen in under one second.

steps.title: Monitor fires
steps.body: StellarAIO's monitor detects new SKU stock and queues every task in the matching group.

steps.title: Proxy attaches
steps.body: Each task picks a fresh residential IP from its assigned pool. No shared identity.

steps.title: Add-to-cart
steps.body: ATC request fires using a pre-built session. Sub-50ms on every supported module.

steps.title: Auto-solve CAPTCHA
steps.body: Cloudflare Turnstile and reCAPTCHA solved automatically via integrated solver.

steps.title: Payment + confirm
steps.body: Saved billing profile fires payment. Confirmation email lands in inbox.

data.title: 70 retailers. One subscription.
data.subtitle: Activate via Whop in under 2 minutes. Instant access, cancel any time.
